name: record_evidence
description: Wrap a shell command and append a structured tool-call entry to .specify/runtime/tool-calls.jsonl. The wrapped command's stdout/stderr stream through to the caller (preserved exit code), AND a JSONL row records argv, exit code, duration, stdout/stderr hashes. This is the v5.1 / v6 primary evidence path — wrap every gate-relevant command (test runs, lints, builds) via this tool so the state-transition-guard can accept the log entry as DoD evidence without needing inline ≥10-line markdown.

args.description: Argument list for the wrapped command.

spec.description: Spec slug (sets BUBBLES_SPEC env var on the wrapped run).
